title: The Hidden Cost of a Big Heart:  Understanding Emotional Burnout
description: A mental health counsellor’s perspective on how emotional burnout affects empathetic individuals who constantly give without setting boundaries: learn  signs, causes, and practical ways to protect your energy, set healthy limits, and recover while maintaining emotional balance.
